No confirmed blocker bugs found in the three requested areas after the latest fixes.

- Resume path now correctly skips provider precheck when `providerDeploymentId` already exists (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:826`).
- Stale `running` deployments with pending cancel now fail with a distinct cancel-pending timeout code/message instead of being marked cancelled (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1576`).
- Cancel-reconcile path now preserves `QueueRetryError` instead of collapsing it into `PolicyError`, so retry semantics are retained (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1783`).

No blocker-level regressions confirmed in this pass.
